title: Luffy Heads Back to Mock Town
description: The Saruyama Alliance finishes the ship’s upgrades as the Straw Hats get ready for the impossible launch.
scene: Across pages 5, 6, 7, 8, this scene centers on Bellamy, Blackbeard, Sarquiss, Mont Blanc Cricket, Luffy. The Saruyama Alliance finishes the ship’s upgrades as the Straw Hats get ready for the impossible launch.

dialogue.speaker: Bellamy
dialogue.text: I doubt any more will show.

dialogue.speaker: Blackbeard
dialogue.text: I came here out of boredom.

dialogue.speaker: Sarquiss
dialogue.text: I see, that's quite troubling to hear.

dialogue.speaker: Mont Blanc Cricket
dialogue.text: Perhaps I should not have come here...?

dialogue.speaker: Bellamy
dialogue.text: I never imagined you would show...!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Hmph... I'm merely an interested observer.

dialogue.speaker: Bellamy
dialogue.text: That I may be allowed to participate.

dialogue.speaker: Sarquiss
dialogue.text: Ah, you are aware of my name?

summary: The Saruyama Alliance finishes the ship’s upgrades as the Straw Hats get ready for the impossible launch.
